ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source */,
  "num_projects" INTEGER /* Number of projects included in the application */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of all projects in the application */,
  "federal_share" REAL /* Total federal funding share obligated for the projects */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  "submitted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who submitted the application */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_funding_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_source_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the incident */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Average response time for incidents of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant or municipality */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the applicant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the applicant */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the applicant */,
  "funding_history" TEXT /* Summary of past funding received */,
  "previous_applications" INTEGER /* Number of previous applications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the federal agency */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the funding source */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES federal_agency ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the project belongs to */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the project */,
  "federal_share" REAL /* Federal funding share allocated to the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_allocation" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding allocation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the funding is allocated to */,
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source */,
  "amount_allocated" REAL /* Amount of funding allocated to the project */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding was allocated */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_allocation_funding_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_allocation_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the reviewer */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the federal agency */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewers_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES federal_agency ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being scored */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer providing the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given to the application */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer about the application */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was given */,
  "revised" INTEGER /* Indicates if the score was revised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_scores_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_scores_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "federal_agency" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the federal agency */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the federal agency */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the federal agency */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the federal agency */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the federal agency */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)
